creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi there, 

why are you installing FreeBSD 4.8 if I may ask? It is no 
longer supported and seen as legacy.  The 6.X releases are 
the ones following up the 4.X releases, so if you are able 
please use them instead. 

Also note that alot had changed during the transition from 
4.X to 6.X and that might also be the cause of the failures 
you are seeing. 

Please consider using 6.X instead, thanks! 

I will let the PR open for a week from now to get your feedback 
on this :-)
